name: 20 MHz Dual Channel Analog Oscilloscope (CRO)
tagline: Classic dual-channel 20 MHz CRO with ALT triggering and ×10 sweep magnification — proven reliability for electronics labs and service workshops.
description: The Vartech SS-5020B is a 20 MHz dual-channel analog oscilloscope (CRO) with a 6-inch rectangular CRT, 8×10 division internal graticule and 2 kV accelerating voltage. Vertical sensitivity covers 5 mV to 5 V/div with ±3% accuracy. Trigger modes include AUTO, NORM, TV-V and TV-H with four trigger source selections. A ×10 sweep magnification extends the sweep to 20 nS/div. A 1 kHz calibrator output (2 Vp-p) is built in for probe checking. Optional x1/x10 ratio probes available.
features: 20 MHz bandwidth — DC (AC 10 Hz) to 20 MHz (−3 dB); rise time ≤17.5 nS
Dual channel (CH1, CH2, DUAL ALT/CHOP, ADD, CH2 INV) — simultaneous two-signal display
5 mV to 5 V/div vertical sensitivity (±3%) — wide dynamic range
×10 sweep magnification — extends max sweep to 20 nS/div
ALT, AUTO, NORM, TV-V, TV-H trigger modes with CH1, CH2, ALT, LINE, EXT sources
Built-in 1 kHz calibrator output (2 Vp-p ±2%) for probe adjustment
X-Y operation — sensitivity 5 mV to 5 V/div, X-axis bandwidth DC to 500 kHz

specs.label: CRT
specs.value: 6-inch rectangular, internal graticule 8×10 div (1 div = 1 cm), accelerating voltage 2 kV

specs.label: Vertical Mode
specs.value: CH1, CH2, DUAL (ALT/CHOP), ADD, CH2 INV

specs.label: Trigger Sensitivity
specs.value: CH1/CH2: 0.5 div (20 Hz ~ 2 MHz) / 1.5 div (2 ~ 20 MHz);  EXT: 200 mV / 800 mV

specs.label: X-Y Sensitivity
specs.value: 5 mV ~ 5 V / div  (±4%);  Phase error ≤3° (DC ~ 50 kHz);  X-axis bandwidth DC ~ 500 kHz

specs.label: Accessories
specs.value: Operating manual, mains cord.  Probes (×1 / ×10) optional.

name: 30 MHz Dual Channel Analog Oscilloscope (CRO)
tagline: 30 MHz dual-channel CRO with ALT triggering — 50% more bandwidth than the SS-5020B for faster signals and audio/RF work.
description: The Vartech SS-5030B is a 30 MHz dual-channel analog oscilloscope sharing the same proven 6-inch CRT platform as the SS-5020B but with extended bandwidth to 30 MHz. Vertical sensitivity is 5 mV to 5 V/div (±3%), sweep covers 0.2 µS to 0.5 S/div with ×10 magnification, and trigger modes include AUTO, NORM, TV-V and TV-H. Suitable for audio, power electronics, switching power supply and general embedded system signal work.
features: 30 MHz bandwidth — DC (AC 10 Hz) to 30 MHz (−3 dB); rise time ≤17.5 nS
Dual channel (CH1, CH2, DUAL ALT/CHOP, ADD, CH2 INV)
5 mV to 5 V/div vertical sensitivity (±3%)
×10 sweep magnification — extends max sweep to 20 nS/div
ALT, AUTO, NORM, TV-V, TV-H trigger modes with CH1, CH2, ALT, LINE, EXT sources
Built-in 1 kHz calibrator output (2 Vp-p ±2%)

name: 30 MHz Dual Channel CRO with Built-in Component Tester
tagline: 30 MHz oscilloscope with built-in component tester — check resistors, capacitors, inductors, transistors and diodes on the CRT without a separate instrument.
description: The Vartech SS-5030BC is a 30 MHz dual-channel analog oscilloscope with a built-in component tester (C.T.) — the SS-5030B platform with an additional component tester that displays the I-V characteristic of passive and active components directly on the CRT screen. Resistors, capacitors, inductors, transistors and diodes can be checked in-circuit without powering the circuit. All oscilloscope specifications are identical to the SS-5030B.
features: 30 MHz dual-channel oscilloscope — identical spec to SS-5030B
Built-in component tester — I-V characteristic display on CRT for R, L, C, transistors and diodes
In-circuit component checking without powering the circuit — safe fault finding
×10 sweep magnification, ALT triggering, AUTO/NORM/TV trigger modes
5 mV to 5 V/div sensitivity, full trigger source selection

specs.label: CRT
specs.value: 6-inch rectangular, internal graticule 8×10 div (1 div = 1 cm), accelerating voltage 2 kV

specs.label: Vertical Mode
specs.value: CH1, CH2, DUAL (ALT/CHOP), ADD, CH2 INV

specs.label: Component Tester
specs.value: Built-in — I-V characteristic display on CRT for R, L, C, transistors and diodes

specs.label: Accessories

name: 80 MHz 4-Channel Digital Storage Oscilloscope (DSO)
tagline: 4-channel 80 MHz DSO with 1 GS/s, 7-inch TFT, 64K record length and built-in DVM — see four signals simultaneously.
description: The Vartech SS-5080DS4 is an 80 MHz 4-channel digital storage oscilloscope with 1 GS/s real-time sampling (50 GS/s equivalent), a 7-inch 800×480 high-resolution TFT LCD display, 64K record length per channel, USB host and device, FFT, maths, 32 types of auto-measurement and a built-in DVM function. Four independent channels allow engineers to observe multiple signals simultaneously — essential for I²C/SPI bus analysis, motor drive phase relationships, multi-rail power supply verification and any application where signal interaction between channels must be seen at once. Auto Setup provides quick waveform display.
features: 4 independent channels — observe up to 4 signals simultaneously for bus protocols and multi-phase systems
80 MHz bandwidth (−3 dB);  rise time ≤4.4 nS
1 GS/s real-time sampling  (50 GS/s equivalent) — captures fast edges accurately
500 µV/div to 10 V/div vertical deflection — handles millivolt sensor signals and power-level waveforms
64K record length for detailed waveform capture
7-inch 800×480 TFT LCD — large, high-resolution colour display
FFT, maths, 32 types of auto-measurement, dual cursor (ΔV, ΔT, 1/ΔT)
Built-in DVM function, USB host & device, auto setup

specs.label: Bandwidth
specs.value: DC ~ 80 MHz  (−3 dB);  Rise time ≤4.4 nS

specs.label: Measurements
specs.value: 32 types of auto-measurement;  dual cursor (ΔV, ΔT, 1/ΔT)

specs.label: Other Features
specs.value: Auto Setup;  probe attenuation ratio setup per channel;  waveform & setup storage

specs.label: Accessories
specs.value: User's manual, mains cord;  ratio probes optional

name: 100 MHz Dual Channel Digital Storage Oscilloscope (DSO)
tagline: 100 MHz dual-channel DSO with 1 GS/s, 4M record length, 7-inch TFT and USB — high-performance signal capture for embedded and power electronics.
description: The Vartech SS-5100DS1B is a 100 MHz dual-channel digital storage oscilloscope with 1 GS/s real-time sampling, a 7-inch 800×480 TFT LCD, 4M record length per channel (8M total), USB host and device, FFT, maths and 32 types of auto-measurement. It handles fast signal work in switching power supplies, embedded microcontroller systems and motor drives. The 2 mV/div minimum sensitivity resolves small signals from sensors and op-amp outputs. Auto Setup ensures quick display of any repetitive signal.
features: 100 MHz bandwidth (−3 dB);  rise time ≤3.5 nS
Dual channel with 1 GS/s real-time sampling
2 mV/div to 10 V/div vertical deflection
4M record length per channel (8M total) — detailed deep-memory waveform capture
7-inch 800×480 TFT LCD display
FFT, maths, 32 types of auto-measurement, cursor measurements (ΔV, ΔT, 1/ΔT)
USB host & device — waveform and screenshot export

name: 150 MHz DSO with Built-in 25 MHz Arbitrary Waveform Generator
tagline: Top-of-range 150 MHz DSO plus an integrated 25 MHz AWG — signal source and analyser in one bench instrument.
description: The Vartech SS-5150DS1B FG is a 150 MHz dual-channel digital storage oscilloscope with a built-in 25 MHz arbitrary waveform generator (AWG). The AWG outputs sine, square, ramp, exponential, noise, DC and arbitrary waveforms from 1 µHz to 25 MHz at up to 3.5 Vpp into 50 Ω. The 1 GS/s DSO shares all specifications with the SS-5100DS1B — 4M record length, 7-inch TFT, USB, FFT, 32 auto-measurements and cursor measurements. An ideal instrument for stimulus-response testing, filter characterisation, amplifier frequency response and general circuit verification.
features: 150 MHz bandwidth (−3 dB);  rise time ≤3.5 nS
Built-in AWG: 1 channel, Sine/Square/Ramp/Exponential/Noise/DC/Arbitrary — 1 µHz to 25 MHz
AWG output: up to 3.5 Vpp (into 50 Ω)
Dual channel with 1 GS/s real-time sampling
2 mV/div to 10 V/div vertical deflection
4M record length per channel (8M total)
7-inch 800×480 TFT LCD, USB host & device

specs.value: DC ~ 150 MHz  (−3 dB);  Rise time ≤3.5 nS
